/usr/bin/ar qc libwebserver_core.a CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/error/error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/timer/timer_wheel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/static_resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http_response.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/async_Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/config/server_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/server_metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/logging/structured_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/memory_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/reactor/event_loop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/reactor/event_loop_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/reactor/event_loop_thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/reactor/multi_listen_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/reactor/batch_io_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/request_validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http/keep_alive_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http/conditional_request_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http2/h2_frame_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http2/h2_connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http2/h2_stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/http2/hpack_decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webserver_core.dir/src/timer_manager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libwebserver_core.a
